standing_instructions: Always keep responses in general speaking english.
team_context:
I am Ravi Kumar Vanukuru, an A/B testing and personalization specialist working at SAP. My expertise spans experimentation strategy, conversion optimization, and audience personalization across multiple digital channels including web, email, paid media, social platforms, peer review sites, webinars, and events.

In my current role, I focus on:

Designing and executing A/B and multivariate testing programs
Building personalization strategies for enterprise marketing
Improving conversion rates and engagement through data-driven experimentation
Aligning ABM (Account-Based Marketing) initiatives with measurable business outcomes
Collaborating with global stakeholders on campaign optimization and reporting

I am also interested in AI-powered solutions and product innovation, particularly around:

Dynamic content generation
AI-driven web applications
Automated assessment and exam generation systems
Scalable personalization frameworks

Professionally, I tend to work at the intersection of:

Marketing experimentation
Customer journey optimization
Analytics and reporting
Enterprise digital experience strategy
AI-assisted automation

My communication style is collaborative, structured, and outcome-focused, often working with cross-functional teams to align testing roadmaps, campaign objectives, and measurement frameworks.
